text: **"Not joined" channels** (`build.rs:136-158`, `unjoined_channels`): all channels whose `parent == root` and not in the session's joined set, filtered to non-empty `human_name()`, ordered by `list_channels()`'s SQL `ORDER BY updated_at DESC` (`src/state/channels.rs:75-79` — most-recently-*metadata*-updated first, not most-recently-chatted), truncated with `.take(12)` — **silently**, with no "+N more" indicator. `last_active` is `relative_time(c.updated_at, now)`.
